title: Coral: a dual context-aware basecaller for nanopore direct RNA sequencing
author: Xie, Shaohui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Raw RNA sequencing data from Oxford Nanopore. The dataset is comprised of 100k randomly selected reads. Zebrafish's original data is from ENA accession ERX9536682.
